articles.title: v2.1.214
articles.author: ashwin-ant
articles.summary: What's changed Fixed single-segment dir/** allow rules like Edit(src/**) auto-approving writes to nested dir/ directories anywhere in the tree instead of only <cwd>/dir Fixed a permission-check bypass affecting commands run in Windows PowerShell 5.1 sessions Fixed Bash permission checks to fail closed on file-descriptor redirect forms that bash parses differently than the permission analyzer Fixed Bash permission checks misjudging very long commands — commands over 10,000 characters now always p
